headline: The Verge’s 2026 high school graduation gift guide
summary: Find the perfect high school graduation gifts for 2026. Guide caters to grads entering careers or continuing education. Help new graduates navigate increased responsibilities.

headline: It's make or break time for AI labeling systems
summary: AI labeling systems face their biggest test yet. Technologies like SynthID and C2PA aim to spot deepfakes. Major expansion will reveal their effectiveness in tagging AI content.

headline: Trump Mobile may be leaking customer addresses
summary: Trump Mobile accused of insecurely storing customer data. Addresses and phone numbers allegedly left vulnerable. Report also reveals fewer T1 Phone orders than widely claimed.

headline: Insta360’s Mic Pro uses a three microphone array for improved recordings
summary: Insta360 launches its new wireless Mic Pro system. Features a unique three-microphone array for superior audio. Transmitters connect via Bluetooth, available individually or in kits.

headline: The Hoppers 4K Steelbook Is Back in Stock at Amazon Ahead of Its June Release
summary: The Hoppers 4K steelbook is back in stock at Amazon. Preorder now for $44.99 before its June 2 release. Limited availability for the popular collector's item.

headline: Subnautica 2 Outlines Changes Coming to the Game in Response to No Killing Fish Debate
summary: Subnautica 2 developers address community feedback on fish killing. Apology issued for past staff comments on the debate. Game will not feature actual weapons, maintaining its core vision.

headline: EXCLUSIVE: Monopoly F1 Edition Board Game Revealed With Its Own Monopoly Grand Prix
summary: IGN exclusively reveals the new Monopoly F1 Edition. Players compete in a Monopoly Grand Prix as their favorite F1 team. Fight for Drivers' and Constructors' Championships in this unique edition.

headline: Gender Queer: The Annotated Edition Expands America's Most Banned Graphic Novel
summary: "Gender Queer: The Annotated Edition" is a new, expanded version. Revisits America's most banned graphic novel. Offers fresh insights into the controversial work.

headline: Women who died in sea off Brighton were sisters
summary: Three women who died in the sea off Brighton identified as sisters. Their father expressed immense grief, stating "no words can truly describe the pain." Tragic incident leaves a family devastated.

headline: Fuel duty freeze extended until the end of the year
summary: Fuel duty freeze extended through the end of the year. Initial 5p cut in duty was implemented in March 2022. Aims to alleviate costs for consumers.

headline: Supermarkets hit back over pressure to cap price of milk, bread and eggs
summary: Supermarkets resist pressure to cap prices on essential foods. Minister confirms talks occurred but no mandatory caps planned. Debate continues on controlling rising food costs.

headline: Channel 4 boss 'deeply sorry' over MAFS UK rape allegations
summary: Channel 4 boss expresses deep regret over MAFS UK rape allegations. Priya Dogra found Panorama's report "very troubling." Allegations came from former cast members of the show.
